name: Gargoyle Sorceress
tips: 20🗡️/50🤍 for 5 mana is already a wall. Placement matters — drop her one row in front of a Dark ranged ally and the DM buff triples.
Best pair: a Dark ranged minion (Range > 0, Element Dark) sitting behind her in the same column — Shadow Blaster and Grave Caller both qualify. Erebus does not (Range 0, melee).

DM here means your TOTAL Dark Matter across your minions on the board — she has none of her own at Summon. Without the placement condition you get +DM🗡️/+DM🤍. With it you get +3×DM🗡️/+3×DM🤍. At 5 total DM that's +15🗡️/+15🤍 vs +5🗡️/+5🤍.
The 2-card discard cost is 'any' tribe — dump cards you can't play this turn rather than sitting on them.

Discarding Dark Matter Stash triggers its on-Discard +1 DM to ally Mages already on the board. The grant resolves before the Sorceress lands, so she herself does not receive it — but your other Mages do.
rulings: The placement condition checks the tile directly behind her (one row toward your own back row) when her Summon effects resolve — after the post-summon react window. A react that removes the Dark ranged ally behind her before then cancels the triple; a friendly Dark ranged minion must sit there at resolution, i.e. she must be directly in front of it.

condition_multiplier applies to the scaled amount: base 0 + your total Dark Matter across your live minions = N, then N × 3 = final buff. Her own DM is always 0 at Summon — the scale reads your board's pool, not her personal stacks.
Both buffs (atk and hp) share the same placement condition — either both triple or neither triples.
Discarded cards go to the Exhaust pile, not the Graveyard. Cost-discards fire on-Discard triggers (e.g. Dark Matter Stash's DM grant).
